scripts.cap:dev: cross-env CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=http://10.0.2.2:3000 npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:dev:ios: cross-env CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000 npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:prod: cross-env CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=https://sel-ko.co.kr npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && cross-env CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=https://sel-ko.co.kr npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run build && cross-env CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=https://sel-ko.co.kr npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.cap:prod:ios: cross-env CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=https://sel-ko.co.kr npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
